description_long: An elderly man stands with a slightly hunched posture, dressed in traditional, modest attire. He wears a long, dark blue vest over a light beige shirt with rolled-up sleeves, and a matching blue cap on his head. His pants are dark blue and tucked into light gray socks, with black shoes completing the outfit. His face is marked by a long, pointed white beard and mustache, and his expression is calm and neutral. The skin is pale, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The overall appearance suggests a gentle, wise character, possibly a figure of respect in an urban or village setting.
description: An elderly man with a long white beard, wearing a blue vest, cap, and traditional clothing, stands with a slightly hunched posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's facial features, long white beard, and full outfit including vest, shirt, and cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hunched posture, profile of the face, and the layering of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, cap, and the way the pants and socks are worn.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and arm position, as well as the side of the cap.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional, modest attire consisting of a long blue vest, light beige rolled-up shirt, dark blue pants, gray socks, black shoes, and a blue cap.
attribute_hairstyle: short white hair mostly covered by a blue cap, with a long pointed white beard and mustache
attribute_facial_features: long pointed white beard, mustache, pronounced wrinkles, calm expression
